mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_fire_issue WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '진행중' THEN 0 WHEN '지연' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, due_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_fire_issue WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_issue WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_issue WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fire_issue (issue_no, facility, issue_type, found_date, issue_content, action_content, due_date, progress_pct, status, owner_name, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{issueNo}, #{facility}, #{issueType}, #{foundDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{issueContent}, #{actionContent}, #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{progressPct}0, #{status}, #{ownerName}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fire_issue SET issue_no = #{issueNo}, facility = #{facility}, issue_type = #{issueType}, found_date = #{foundDate,jdbcType=DATE}, issue_content = #{issueContent}, action_content = #{actionContent}, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, progress_pct = #{progressPct}, status = #{status}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_fire_issue SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
